units.desc: State verbs (want, know, mean…) not usually continuous.

units.desc: Actions in progress at a past moment.

units.desc: Past action with a present result / recent news.

units.desc: Activity continuing up to now / recently.

units.title: for and since; when …? and how long …?

units.desc: I have done vs I did — result vs finished time.

units.title: Present perfect and past 2
units.desc: Perfect for 'up to now'; past for finished time.

units.title: Past perfect (I had done)
units.desc: An earlier past before another past event.
units.exA: The film had started when we arrived.

units.title: Past perfect continuous (I had been doing)
units.desc: Activity going on before a past point.
units.exB: They'd been playing for an hour.

units.title: used to (do)
units.desc: Past habits & states that are no longer true.

units.desc: Deciding now (will) vs already decided (going to).

when I do and when I've done; if and when

units.desc: Unreal present vs unfulfilled past possibility.

units.desc: Continuous & past forms; may/might as well.

units.title: should 2
units.exB: It's odd that she should say that.

units.exB: When we were kids, we'd play outside.

if I knew … I wish I knew …

to …, for … and so that …

although / though / in spite of / despite
